title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 532.300 - Proceedings on return of writ
text:
532.300.  Proceedings on return of writ. — If the person having such prisoner in custody shall be brought before a court as for a criminal offense, he shall be examined, committed, bailed or discharged, in like manner as in other criminal cases of like nature.
(RSMo 1939 § 1642, A.L. 1978 H.B. 1634) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1478; 1919 § 1928; 1909 § 2493 
Effective 1-02-79
